name: Hapa Character Sheet App Kanban
summary: App-specific Hapa protocol board for the Hapa Character Sheet node: resume, RPG stat sheet, skill codex, media portfolio, lineage viewer, and agent dossier.

columns.label: Backlog
columns.intent: Known work not yet ready for implementation.

columns.label: Ready
columns.intent: Scoped work with enough context to start.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.intent: Work that needs a decision, dependency, or external state change.

columns.label: Review
columns.intent: Ready for owner or Overwatch review.

actors.label: Human
actors.role: Project owner, external-claim reviewer, and visibility authority.

actors.label: Codex
actors.role: Implementation, docs, API/CLI/UI parity, and verification.

actors.label: Overwatch
actors.role: Append-only tracking, review gates, safety, and integration evidence.

actors.label: Blue
actors.role: Source truth, data adapter, schema, lineage, and manifests.

actors.label: Green
actors.role: UI, portfolio surface, accessibility, exports, and demo polish.

actors.label: Truth
actors.role: Claim review, privacy gates, provenance, confidence labels.

sourceTruthHierarchy: Live Hapa Character Sheet source when created
Hapa Second Brain database and API
Hapa Protocol Standards and wiki protocol pages
protocol.recordRule: Every build action, protocol decision, blocker, handoff, verification note, and human review decision is appended as an event. The board is a projection of events.
protocol.safeActionPolicy: Do not expose private source history in public exports. Do not mutate Second Brain raw memory, credentials, or wiki canon without explicit owner authorization.
